name: PayTabs
description: PayTabs — MENA payment gateway covering Saudi Arabia, UAE, Egypt, and 5+ countries with cards, digital wallets, and recurring billing.

seo.title: PayTabs — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: PayTabs: PayTabs — MENA payment gateway covering Saudi Arabia, UAE, Egypt, and 5+ countries with cards, digital wallets, and recurring billing.

when_to_use: Accepting cards and digital wallets for Saudi Arabia merchants
Recurring billing for MENA SaaS subscription products
3DS2-authenticated checkout for UAE and Egypt e-commerce

pros: Covers Saudi, UAE, Egypt, and more MENA
Supports local wallets and recurring billing
review.verdict: Viable MENA-wide gateway, especially for GCC, though developer experience trails global standards.
review.best_for: Merchants expanding across MENA needing unified acquiring in GCC and Egypt
review.not_for: Teams expecting polished modern API ergonomics and fast onboarding

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
